summary: Role 6 source truth/provenance review completed read-only. Verdict: REVISE_REQUIRED because the remaining plan must keep source/chunk/claim lineage as an explicit hard acceptance condition rather than treating it as an implied part of retrieval/search quality.
decisions: Source/provenance surfaces exist in docs, code, and data chunks, but a candidate plan limited to P0-04/P0-05/P1-09/P1-10 needs an explicit provenance gate to avoid hollow RAG.
Anchor-only or verified-summary source records must not be used as factual support unless claim-level support status is explicit and reviewable.
next_steps: Add a mandatory source-truth/provenance acceptance item to the unfinished improvement plan.
Require Context Packs and evaluations to distinguish behavior memory, source citation, anchor-only source, verified summary, and claim-supported source chunk.
Require graph/health/eval checks to fail on dangling claim_paths, missing provenance records, and factual claims backed only by internal traces.
